stemHtml: The regulatory conditions to be met for issue and continued validity of an AOC are…

options.a: The original certificate must be surrendered and re-issued within 28 days following an inspection by the Authority.
options.b: The operator remaining in compliance of all regulations and granting full access to the competent Authority.
options.c: The original certificate must be surrendered and re-issued followed an inspection by the Authority.
options.d: Any findings for non-compliance will revoke the AOC.
